checklist.question: Did receivables grow materially faster than revenue across consecutive periods?
Did non-current 'soft' assets grow materially faster than the business overall?

evidence.quote: Goodwill=22810000 (2014-06-30) rising to 62451000 (2016-06-30) despite flat store of operations
OtherAssetsNoncurrent=4744000 (2015-03-31) vs 43342000 (2016-06-30) — an ~9x increase within a year

checklist.question: Is there a persistent divergence between net income and operating cash flow?

evidence.quote: Operating cash flow fell from 70317000 (FY2014) to 44565000 (FY2015) to -5211000 (FY2016) while reported net income stayed positive (30681000, 37217000, 24844000)

checklist.question: Do inventory levels or gross margins show trends inconsistent with revenue?

evidence.quote: InventoryNet is immaterial for a trucking operator (1857000 at 2015-06-30 rising to 4201000 at 2016-12-31); CostOfGoodsAndServicesSold series ends in FY2011 (3537000)
evidence.location: 10-Q inventory; COGS not reported after FY2011

checklist.question: Is the earnings trajectory unusually smooth relative to the volatility of revenue and cash flow?

evidence.quote: Quarterly NetIncomeLoss clustered tightly (5458000, 5455000, 5658000, 8965000 across FY2012 quarters) while operating cash flow swung widely and turned negative (-22807000 in 2015-Q1)
OperatingIncomeLoss remained smooth/high (65785000 FY2015, 52206000 FY2016) even as OCF collapsed to -5211000 (FY2016)

checklist.question: Did liability, allowance, or reserve balances decline (or fail to grow) despite growing business activity?

evidence.quote: AllowanceForDoubtfulAccountsReceivableCurrent=1045000 (2011-06-30) on AR of 64723000 (1.61%) fell to 919000 (2013-06-30) on AR of 77623000 (1.18%) and 942000 (2014-06-30) on AR of 105968000 (0.89%)
Allowance declined in absolute dollars from 1045000 (2011-06-30) to 869000 (2013-09-30) even as receivables grew ~26%

checklist.question: Does the filing chronology show irregularities (late filings/NT forms, amendments, unusual 8-K frequency)?

evidence.quote: NT 10-Q filed 2017-02-09 (notification of late filing) immediately preceding the 10-Q filed 2017-02-10
Prior restatement activity: 10-K/A (2012-05-18) and two 10-Q/A filed 2012-05-25 revising FY2011/2012 quarterly balances
Repeated SEC comment-letter correspondence: UPLOAD/CORRESP cycles in 2013, 2016 (UPLOAD 2016-03-10, CORRESP 2016-04-08, UPLOAD 2016-06-27)

checklist.question: Is the provided data sufficient in coverage and length for the above assessments?

evidence.quote: Continuous quarterly and annual coverage of balance sheet, income, and cash flow items from FY2011 (2011-06-30) through 2016-12-31

mechanism_hypotheses.accounting_treatment: Overstatement of the carrying value of revenue equipment (tractors/trailers) held for sale and recognition of inflated gains on equipment transactions. The abnormal build-up and sudden collapse of soft non-current assets (OtherAssetsNoncurrent 11951000 at 2015-12-31 -> 43342000 at 2016-06-30 -> 9698000 at 2016-12-31) alongside falling PP&E-net (788530000 at 2015-06-30 -> 610777000 at 2016-12-31) while operating income stayed high suggests gains/asset values were propped up and then written down, overstating income and assets in prior periods.

Earnings quality deterioration: reported net income remained positive while operating cash flow went sharply negative, indicating income recognized without corresponding cash conversion (non-cash gains, growing receivables/deferred items). Consistent with premature or fictitious revenue/gain recognition.

Under-reserving: the allowance for doubtful accounts declined in absolute terms and as a percent of receivables while receivables grew, understating bad-debt expense and thereby overstating net receivables and net income.

top_signals: Net income persistently positive while operating cash flow collapsed to negative (FY2016 NI 24844000 vs OCF -5211000)
Abnormal build-up then sudden collapse of soft non-current assets (OtherAssetsNoncurrent 43342000 at 2016-06-30 to 9698000 at 2016-12-31) with declining PP&E-net
Allowance for doubtful accounts fell in dollars and % while receivables grew
NT 10-Q late-filing notice (2017-02-09) plus prior restatements (10-K/A, 10-Q/A 2012) and repeated SEC comment letters
